gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (91/ 2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (91/ 2)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ

text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ اسْمُهُ وَ تَعَالَى ذِكْرُهُ وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ سُبْحَانَهُ وَ تَقَدَّسَ وَ تَفَرَّدَ وَ تَوَحَّدَ وَ لَمْ يَزَلْ وَ لَا يَزَالُ وَ هُوَ الْأَوَّلُ وَ الْآخِرُ وَ الظَّاهِرُ وَ الْبَاطِنُ

فَلَا أَوَّلَ لِأَوَّلِيَّتِهِ رَفِيعاً فِي أَعْلَى عُلُوِّهِ شَامِخُ الْأَرْكَانِ رَفِيعُ الْبُنْيَانِ عَظِيمُ السُّلْطَانِ مُنِيفُ الْآلَاءِ سَنِيُّ الْعَلْيَاءِ الَّذِي عَجَزَ الْوَاصِفُونَ عَنْ كُنْهِ صِفَتِهِ وَ لَا يُطِيقُونَ حَمْلَ مَعْرِفَةِ إِلَهِيَّتِهِ وَ لَا يَحُدُّونَ حُدُودَهُ لِأَنَّهُ بِالْكَيْفِيَّةِ لَا يُتَنَاهَى إِلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Al Husayn Bin Yazed, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Ibrahim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Blessed is His<sup>azwj</sup> Name, and Exalted is His<sup>azwj</sup> Mention, and Majestic is His<sup>azwj</sup> Laudation. Glorious is He<sup>azwj</sup>, and Holy, and Individual, and Unique, and He<sup>azwj</sup> did not Cease to be and will not Cease to be, and He<sup>azwj</sup> is the First, and the Last, and the Manifest, and the Hidden.

So there is no first to His<sup>azwj</sup> being First, Raised in His<sup>azwj</sup> High Loftiness. Lofty of the elements, Raiser of the Structures, Magnificent of the Authority, of High Eminence, Sublime Highness which the describers are unable from describing His<sup>azwj</sup> Essence, nor are they enduring the bearing of recognising His<sup>azwj</sup> God-ness, nor are they reaching its limits, because He<sup>azwj</sup>, by the qualitative states, cannot be reached.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Salih ibn Hammad from al-Husayn ibn Yazid from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn abu Hamza from Ibrahim from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) Who has said the following. “Allah, the Most Holy is Whose name, the Most High is Whose praise, the Most Glorious are Whose attributes. He is the Most Sacred, the Most Holy, the only One in oneness. He is eternal, the First and the Last, the Manifest and the Hidden. There is no beginning for Him. He is the Most Exalted in His highness. The Highest in power, Exalted in authority, the greatest in kingdom, the Most bountiful, His Highness is the Most High. He is the One whose praise no one can complete, and can not bear the knowledge of His Lordship. No one is able to limit Him because it is not possible to reach Him with qualities.”
